headline: Football (Soccer) Tactics and Formations
description: Football (soccer) tactics define team shape, playing style, and strategic approach. Formations: 4-4-2 (balanced), 4-3-3 (attacking), 4-2-3-1 (modern standard), 3-5-2 (wing-backs). Key tactical concepts: pressing (high/medium/low block), possession vs direct play, gegenpressing (counter-press), Tiki-taka (short-pass domination).

citation.name: Inverting the Pyramid: The History of Football Tactics (Jonathan Wilson)
